intent: Review a specific file or change set for exploitability.
shouldTrigger: Use /security-review on the payment webhook changes.
Find security bugs in this diff.
shouldNotTrigger: Scan the entire repo for vulnerabilities.
Give me a normal code review of this PR.
Map the architecture of the service.
smokeWorkflow: User provides a file, directory, or small change set.
Skill runs the targeted security scan if available, then traces untrusted input through validation, authorization, processing, and output.
Skill returns exploit-focused findings with severity, attack path, and concrete fixes.
